effort_complexity.rationale: Breadth across ~13 read/write sites applying one established ears.go precedence; depth low except the shared spec.Record test_refs extension (Coach-ratified). Confirmed at design review.

design_decisions.choice: CHOICE-A: keep worker/RunSliceFn slice-dir-anchored path; no signature change. implement.Run derives sliceDir=filepath.Dir(specPath) and resolves spec.json via spec.LoadSpec, so callers pass a directory-anchored path unchanged.
design_decisions.rationale: Local and reversible; minimal churn. No cross-package signature ripple.

design_decisions.choice: CHOICE-B: sworn run --task on-ramp (run.go setupSlice and cmd/sworn/task.go) emits an authoritative spec.json (via implement.WriteSpecRecord) alongside the human spec.md, keeping the engine on one contract path.
design_decisions.rationale: In-scope item 4 authorises stopping spec.md as the source of truth; spec.md retained as legacy artefact so the on-ramp is consistent with every other read site.

design_decisions.choice: Extend the shared spec.Record AC contract with test_refs []string (spec-v1 schema-sanctioned) so internal/rtm's need->AC->test golden thread resolves on a spec.json-only release; sourced spec.json-preferred with spec.md fallback (AC-06).
options: (a) extend spec.Record.AC with test_refs now (additive, omitempty, spec.json-preferred)
(b) leave rtm required-tests on spec.md and defer required-tests-from-spec.json as a tracked Rule 2 item
design_decisions.human_decision: Option (a) RATIFIED by Brad (Coach) — captain-proceed.md Pin 1 (2026-07-12). test_refs is a real spec-v1 AC field (id/text/ears_pattern/test_refs); exposing it completes the machine-contract read. AC-06 added to the amended spec.json.
design_decisions.rationale: Additive/reversible but modifies the shared spec.Record contract consumed by ears/trace/coverage/rtm — a shared read contract, so classified Type-1 and carried a recorded Coach decision.

reachability_artifacts: live: sworn specquality 2026-07-11-loop-operability PASS + sworn lint ac 2026-07-11-loop-operability (reads 6 S01 ACs from spec.json)
